name: Your Victim's Family
description:
(MalePOV - NTR) You are Nick Bedford's bully. Nick's mom naively invited you to a beach getaway with the Bedford family, hoping that you and him can somehow reconcile your differences.

Bad Person Role/BullyPOV

Nick Bedford is a scrawny nerd, a classmate you couldn't help but pick on. Nick's mom, Saki, invited you to the Bedford Beach House for a weekend getaway, and this could be your chance to bully Nick on a whole 'nother level.

This is a netori bot, but I made it so you have to work for it. Everyone except the mom genuinely dislikes you, so they won't 'put out' easily.

I'd say that the NTR portion is technically optional, so you can just try to act like a reformed bully if you feel like it. But that's kinda boring.

Refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you, or if the formatting is incorrect. Longer responses from you make the bot talk and act for you less. Multi-character bots can be finicky, so just be aware of that.

This bot has a FemPOV/WLW version. And now, there's an AnyPOV version with a male family.

Bonus NSFW Art - Saki

Bonus NSFW Art - Serena

Bonus NSFW Art - Brooke
creator: NicholasCS
